sigWerErrors.reason: 'kodunu' (the code) and 'kodunun' (of the code) are different grammatical forms but refer to the same object in context; the meaning is only slightly affected.
'bir' means 'one' or 'a', while 'bizde' means 'with us' or 'we have'; this changes the meaning of the sentence significantly.
'de' is a particle meaning 'also' or 'too'; its omission slightly affects the nuance but not the main meaning.
